summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Staff Pointage (Time Tracking) module. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all features working: 6 KPIs, pointage table with status badges, QR Code dialog, Manual pointage dialog with form validation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/staff/pointage/hotels/{hotel_id}/stats - Returns statistics (200)
Backend: Stats structure validated - 12 required fields present
Backend: Stats values are valid numbers (pointes, total_employees, etc.)
Backend: Stats with date filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/staff/pointage/hotels/{hotel_id}/qr-code - Returns QR URL (200)
Backend: QR code structure valid - contains hotel_id and token
Backend: QR code URL format valid - points to /pointage/mobile
Backend: GET /api/staff/pointage/hotels/{hotel_id}/pointages - Returns list (200)
Backend: Pointages with date filter works correctly
Backend: Pointage structure valid - required fields present
Backend: POST /api/staff/pointage/hotels/{hotel_id}/manual - Requires employee_id
Backend: Manual pointage requires non-empty reason
Backend: Manual pointage creates successfully with valid data
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/staff/employees - Returns active employees (200)
Backend: Employee structure valid for pointage
Backend: GET /api/staff/pointage/hotels/{hotel_id}/config - Returns config (200)
Backend: Config structure valid - late_tolerance_minutes present
Frontend: Pointage tab visible in Staff SubNavigation
Frontend: Pointage page loads with data-testid='staff-pointage'
Frontend: 6 KPI cards displayed (Effectif, Pointés, Conformes, Retards, Heures sup, H.Sup validées)
Frontend: Pointage table with columns (Collaborateur, Service, Prévu, Entrée, Sortie, Durée, Écart, H.Sup, Statut, Source)
Frontend: Status badges working (En cours - blue, Conforme - green)
Frontend: QR Code button opens dialog with generated QR code
Frontend: QR dialog shows hotel name and Copy/Print buttons
Frontend: Manual pointage button opens dialog
Frontend: Manual dialog has all required fields (Employee select, Date, Check-in, Check-out, Reason)
Frontend: Manual pointage form submission works - creates pointage and shows success toast
Frontend: Filters present (Date picker, Search, Department, Status)
Frontend: Source badges working (Manuel - blue)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend uses 'staff_employees' collection correctly as per agent context
QR code URL correctly includes hotel_id and token for mobile pointage
Status badges correctly implemented: conforme (green), retard (amber), en_cours (blue)
Late tolerance configured at 10 minutes as per requirements
Manual pointage requires reason with minimum 5 characters - validation working
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Test pointages created via manual pointage API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Pointage module fully tested. Backend APIs: /api/staff/pointage/hotels/{hotel_id}/stats, /qr-code, /pointages, /manual, /config all working. Frontend: StaffPointage.jsx component with KPIs, table, QR dialog, manual dialog all functional. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_staff_pointage.py. Existing pointages for 2026-03-26: Claire Petit (En cours), Lucie Martin (Conforme), Thomas Dubois (Conforme).

dialogs: QR Code dialog with generated QR
Manual pointage dialog with form validation
